data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of linked appointments (color → tone → cut), but the evidence does not confirm that follow-up bookings are created automatically after the initial booking. The only evidence available pertains to the initial booking itself, with no indication of downstream effects or follow-up actions. This leads to a clear gap in the requirement coverage, as the necessary linkage between the appointments is not demonstrated.
gaps: No evidence of automatic follow-up bookings created after the initial booking.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
